title: What Jobs Would the Eva Cast Have
display_title: What Jobs Would the Eva Cast Have
wikitext:
[]: What Jobs Would the Eva Cast Have?             Quote Post by Pcnerdjack14 » Mon Nov 23, 2009 5:18 pm Suppose this. There were no Angels, no Evas, no Second Impact, and no NERV. But the characters were more or less the same. What kind of jobs do you think they would have?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Nov 23, 2009 5:23 pm Ritsuko would still be a scientist. The children would most likely still be in school.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Nov 23, 2009 5:50 pm In before somebody posts that fanart of some of the pilots working at Burger King.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Mon Nov 23, 2009 6:12 pm Gendo would work for the IRS.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Nov 23, 2009 6:13 pm Aoba would be a staff musician probably.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Nov 23, 2009 6:30 pm Hyuga would be a manga designer Aoba would be a guitarist in a band Ritsuko would be a doctor with Maya as her assistant Misato would be a whore Kaji would be a pimp Fuyutsuki would work at a senior center with the SEELE commitee, including Kiel, at said senior center Gendo would be a tax collector The Jet Alone Guy would be a car salesman

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Nov 23, 2009 6:34 pm When Shinji is 20 would be an, unpopular, depressed, antisocial, introverted salary man and then he would meet 2 women who become interested in him and he likes both of them, then there would be an awkward romantic love triangle. hilarity ensues

[]:             Quote Post by Pcnerdjack14 » Mon Nov 23, 2009 6:51 pm I saw Asuka as more of an actress, she's already kind of putting on a show in the show, so I can expect to see her in mediocre TV dramas.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Mon Nov 23, 2009 7:34 pm Rei would be a porn star.

[]: Re: What Jobs Would the Eva Cast Have?             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Nov 23, 2009 7:39 pm Pcnerdjack14 wrote: There were no Angels, no Evas, no Second Impact, and no NERV. But the characters were more or less the same. What kind of jobs do you think they would have?

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Mon Nov 23, 2009 8:17 pm Assuming that third impact never occured, the jobs of the Eva pilots would be 1) Shinji- Someone following his dreams (If third impact never occurred, Yui would still be alive thus Shinji wouldn't have his abandonment issues which is what causes his clinical depression) 2) Rei Dunno (If third Impact never occured, Yui and Gendo would be together....and They would have sex...possibly producing a daughter that Gendo would name Rei) 3) Asuka Living in Germany, never meeting Shinji 4) Misato Possibly in the military 5) Gendo A designer of military tech (Possibly designing an Eva like unit) 6) Yui Mother of 2+ children 7) Maya Scissoring 8) Ritsuko Curing diseases

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Nov 23, 2009 8:36 pm Most of the Nerv employees like Gendo, Fuyutsuki, Ritsuko and the Bridge Bunnies would probably be in similar jobs working for the Japanese military. Who knows what Misato would have been; her life was greatly steered into where it is in the series by Second Impact. So her occupation could have been anything. Shinji wouldn't have a job, because Shinji sucks. Rei wouldn't have a job, because Rei doesn't exist. Likewise for Kaworu. Asuka would probably have a job, but just something to rake in some cash until she gets old enough for a more settling job. Kaji would be something of an investigative reporter, or something of the sort.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Mon Nov 23, 2009 10:55 pm For some reason I can imagine Asuka in a situation similar to Eva Heinemann from Monster.... Shinji - Fast food. Gendo - President of the Universe That is all.

[]:             Quote Post by Pcnerdjack14 » Mon Nov 23, 2009 11:05 pm schismatics wrote: Gendo - President of the Universe That is all.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Mon Nov 23, 2009 11:19 pm Naomi would be a highly renown robotics engineer & hopefully her sexual preference wouldn't be met with as much hostility as it was pretty much every friggin' mecha/robotics-related things would all have the touch of Naomi, except she would be doing all of them & in case you're wondering, consult our RP thread to see who she is

[]:             Quote Post by Archon Eva » Tue Nov 24, 2009 6:20 am Sammaeloo wrote: Misato would be a whore Kaji would be a pimp

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Nov 24, 2009 10:32 am Archon Eva wrote: For some reason i see Rei at a local store at a checkout with her hands moving really fast. Don't ask why.

[]:             Quote Post by AVman9 » Tue Nov 24, 2009 10:46 am Sammaeloo wrote: Misato would be a whore Kaji would be a pimp

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 24, 2009 11:51 am Shinji: being annoying useless failure Asuka: whore Rei: wouldn't exist Kaworu: wouldn't exist Misato: with brains and looks like that she could be anything. I say she'd still joi some sort of NERV equivalent Ritsuko: scientist Maya: scientist (Ritsu's lab assistant!) Hyuuga: shonen mangaka Aoba: guitarist in heavy band Gendo: scientist and all-around-political-manipulator Fuyutsuki: professor, obviously Yui: scientist Hikari: cook Toji: basketball player Kensuke: IT-dude Keel Lorenz: politician Kaji: secret agent

[]:             Quote Post by Marzan » Tue Nov 24, 2009 1:12 pm Misato would own a bar...briefly I don't know why I picture Gendo as late night DJ for a radio station that only plays jazz
